feed.title: 智域前沿 · 全球科技与安全态势日报
feed.subtitle: 本期从 9 个公开信源筛选出 10 条重点事件，覆盖科技、AI、航空航天、安全动态与无人系统。

entry.title: Skyroot Aerospace reaches orbit on first Vikram-1 launch
entry.summary: Skyroot Aerospace’s Vikram-1 rocket successfully lifted off on its inaugural flight July 18, becoming the first commercial Indian rocket to reach orbit. 关键事实：Skyroot Aerospace’s Vikram-1 rocket successfully lifted off on its inaugural flight July 18, becoming the first commercial Indian rocket to reach orbit.

entry.title: Space Force triples launch contract ceiling amid rising demand
entry.summary: The maximum value of the National Security Space Launch Phase 3 Lane 1 contract was raised from $5.6 billion to $17 billion 关键事实：The maximum value of the National Security Space Launch Phase 3 Lane 1 contract was raised from $5.6 billion to $17 billion

entry.title: This Graduate Student Equips NASA’s Robots With Assembly Skills
entry.summary: Like many engineers, Sarah Downs says she knew she wanted to pursue a STEM career from a young age. As a teenager, she discovered robotics through her Tulsa, Okla., middle school’… 关键事实：Like many engineers, Sarah Downs says she knew she wanted to pursue a STEM career from a young age. As a teenager, she discovered robotics through her Tulsa, Okla., middle school’…

entry.title: Navy, Army risk wasting money, time without unified hypersonic missile strategy: GAO
entry.summary: The GAO determined that the Navy is already roughly two years behind schedule on modernizing the Zumwalt-class destroyers as part of the more than $50 billion hypersonic effort. 关键事实：The GAO determined that the Navy is already roughly two years behind schedule on modernizing the Zumwalt-class destroyers as part of the more than $50 billion hypersonic effort.

entry.title: US Navy 2 years behind on hypersonic missile installation on Zumwalt destroyers
entry.summary: The U.S. Navy’s expensive effort to install hypersonic missiles on three Zumwalt-class destroyers is two years behind schedule. 关键事实：The U.S. Navy’s expensive effort to install hypersonic missiles on three Zumwalt-class destroyers is two years behind schedule.

entry.title: USS Zumwalt Set To Return To Fleet After Long Anticipated Hypersonic Missile Upgrade
entry.summary: Issues tied to Zumwalt's hugely powerful hybrid-electric power plant and other factors have set back its return to the fleet. 关键事实：Issues tied to Zumwalt's hugely powerful hybrid-electric power plant and other factors have set back its return to the fleet.

entry.title: EU, Ukraine sign drone deal to fast-track unmanned systems production
entry.summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said that the country is currently producing 10 million drones per year and envisions this number rising to 20 million annually with the he… 关键事实：Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said that the country is currently producing 10 million drones per year and envisions this number rising to 20 million annually with the he…

entry.title: 2 defense tech companies sue US Navy after losing out on MUSV program
entry.summary: Two defense tech companies sued the U.S. government, alleging they were unfairly excluded from the Navy's Medium Unmanned Surface Vessel program. 关键事实：Two defense tech companies sued the U.S. government, alleging they were unfairly excluded from the Navy's Medium Unmanned Surface Vessel program.

entry.title: U.S.-Iran Fight Heats Up With Mutual Strikes On Infrastructure Targets
entry.summary: More U.S. Air Force tankers and fighters head to the Middle East as the conflict intensifies. 关键事实：More U.S. Air Force tankers and fighters head to the Middle East as the conflict intensifies.

entry.title: Now, even Russia's most elite hackers are using Clickfix to infect devices
entry.summary: The social-engineering technique has primarily been a tool of financially motivated criminals. 关键事实：The social-engineering technique has primarily been a tool of financially motivated criminals.
